summary: IT subsystem matching slice split from #2617 for easier review. It touched seven src/melee/it files, mostly small source-shape edits in item functions. The decomp-dev report recorded 9 improvements in unmatched items, while reviewer feedback flagged one regression in itseakchain.c where a float literal was replaced by a variable for ordering.

key_files.role: Small declaration-order/source-shape change in it_802706D0; bot report showed a +1 byte improvement from 96.13% to 96.21%.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/it/itcoll.c added 3 deleted 3
raw_diff: it_802706D0 declaration order changed around Item*, HitCapsule*, hit_index, PAD_STACK(8)
text_corpus: decomp-dev report row for main/melee/it/itcoll it_802706D0

key_files.role: Adjusted z absolute-value/source-shape expression in it_802E72E0 by introducing z_abs; bot report showed a small score change with 0 bytes.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/it/items/itarwinglaser.c added 4 deleted 2
raw_diff: it_802E72E0 introduces f32 z_abs and assigns z = -z_abs
text_corpus: decomp-dev report row for main/melee/it/items/itarwinglaser it_802E72E0

key_files.role: Changed inline helper signature to receive HSD_JObj* and Item* from callsites instead of loading them internally; bot report showed +1 byte improvement in it_802EDDC0.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/it/items/itkyasarin.c added 4 deleted 5
raw_diff: itKyasarin_FlipAndFall now takes gobj, jobj, ip and callsites pass GET_JOBJ(gobj), GET_ITEM(gobj)
text_corpus: decomp-dev report row for main/melee/it/items/itkyasarin it_802EDDC0

key_files.role: Replaced direct hsd_obj member access with GET_JOBJ for link jobjs in it_802A7384; bot report showed +2 bytes improvement.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/it/items/itlinkhookshot.c added 2 deleted 2
raw_diff: jobj = link->gobj->hsd_obj changed to jobj = GET_JOBJ(link->gobj)
text_corpus: decomp-dev report row for main/melee/it/items/itlinkhookshot it_802A7384

key_files.role: Several matching-oriented source-shape edits: introduced hitbox_data4 pointer, expanded samus_grapple_anim call into explicit HSD_JObjAnimAll loop, and delayed fp/link initialization. Bot report showed improvements in it_802B7160 and fn_802B8384.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/it/items/itsamusgrapple.c added 21 deleted 11
raw_diff: it_802B7160 introduces struct spawn_hitbox_4* hitbox_data4
raw_diff: fn_802B7E34 replaces samus_grapple_anim(gobj) with explicit HSD_JObjAnimAll calls and link traversal
raw_diff: fn_802B8384 delays fp and link assignments until after declarations/PAD_STACK
text_corpus: decomp-dev report rows for main/melee/it/items/itsamusgrapple it_802B7160 and fn_802B8384

key_files.role: Largest changed file. It adjusted declaration order, removed temporary block locals in stick/velocity logic, and included a reviewer-flagged constant-to-variable replacement in it_802BAF2C.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/it/items/itseakchain.c added 25 deleted 32
raw_diff: it_802BAF2C declaration order changed around attrs, i, zero
raw_diff: it_802BC080 removes stick_x/stick_y and vy_bias temporaries and uses direct fp/attrs field expressions
review_comments: PsiLupan flagged it_802A24D0(link, 1.0f) changed to it_802A24D0(link, it_804DD0E0) as regression
text_corpus: decomp-dev report rows for main/melee/it/items/itseakchain it_802BC080 and it_802BAF2C

key_files.role: Introduced ip2 alias and earlier attr initialization in it_2725_Logic109_HitShield; bot report showed +6 bytes improvement.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/it/items/itseakneedlethrown.c added 7 deleted 6
raw_diff: it_2725_Logic109_HitShield adds Item* ip2 = ip and uses ip2 for velocity/it_802762BC
text_corpus: decomp-dev report row for main/melee/it/items/itseakneedlethrown it_2725_Logic109_HitShield

what_changed: The PR body says this was a path-sliced IT subsystem split from #2617, scoped to src/melee/it, created so matching improvements were easier to review.
Seven files changed under src/melee/it, with 66 added and 61 deleted lines reported in metadata.
The decomp-dev issue comment reported 9 improvements in unmatched items for the PR range 133a9af..636e1b7.
Most edits were source-shape matching changes: declaration ordering, temporary variable introduction/removal, helper call/inline reshaping, GET_JOBJ use, and pointer aliases.
Reviewer PsiLupan flagged a regression in itseakchain.c: replacing literal 1.0f with it_804DD0E0 for ordering should not be done in this PR and could be addressed later.

smart_moves.title: Split broad matching work by directory/subsystem
smart_moves.detail: The PR states it was split from #2617 by directory/subsystem so matching improvements were easier to review, with scope limited to src/melee/it.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Split from #2617 by directory/subsystem so the matching improvements are easier to review
human_pr_text: Scope src/melee/it

smart_moves.title: Recorded narrow slice checks and bot score output
smart_moves.detail: The PR body recorded diff-check status and isolated path slicing, while the decomp-dev comment gave function-level score changes for touched IT functions.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: git diff --check origin/master...HEAD passed for this slice
text_corpus: decomp-dev report with 9 improvements in unmatched items

decomp_lessons.lesson: For matching PRs, avoid changing an inline constant into a data variable solely for ordering when review evidence calls it a regression.
evidence_refs: review_comments: Regression - don't replace the constant with a variable for ordering. We can address this later.
review_comments diff hunk: it_802A24D0(link, 1.0f) changed to it_802A24D0(link, it_804DD0E0)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Declaration order, local lifetime, and aliasing edits can move unmatched-item scores, but this PR evidence supports them only as narrow matching tactics, not as general style rules.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: declaration order changes in it_802706D0, it_802BAF2C, fn_802B8384
raw_diff: ip2 alias in it_2725_Logic109_HitShield
raw_diff: hitbox_data4 pointer in it_802B7160
text_corpus: decomp-dev report with function-level improvements

naming_conventions.name: ip / fp / gobj / jobj
naming_conventions.context: Existing short local role names appear in touched item/fighter/jobj functions and were preserved or passed explicitly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itKyasarin_FlipAndFall(gobj, HSD_JObj* jobj, Item* ip)
raw_diff: Item* ip = GET_ITEM(gobj); Fighter* fp = GET_FIGHTER(ip->owner)

naming_conventions.name: hitbox_data4
naming_conventions.context: Local pointer name introduced for data->create_hitbox.create_hitbox_4 in it_802B7160.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct spawn_hitbox_4* hitbox_data4; hitbox_data4 = &data->create_hitbox.create_hitbox_4

naming_conventions.name: z_abs
naming_conventions.context: Local temporary introduced to represent the absolute value of z before assigning a negated value.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: f32 z_abs; z_abs = z; if (z < 0.0f) z_abs = -z; z = -z_abs

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Reorder local declarations and initialization timing near PAD_STACK to alter codegen.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_802706D0 local declaration order changed
raw_diff: it_802BAF2C attrs declaration moved after int i
raw_diff: fn_802B8384 link/fp initialization moved below PAD_STACK(20)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: PR evidence shows score improvements but does not provide objdiff details for each local-order change.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce narrow pointer aliases for repeated nested struct access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hitbox_data4 points to data->create_hitbox.create_hitbox_4
raw_diff: ip2 alias used for velocity writes and it_802762BC(ip2)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Treat aliases as matching tactics supported by this slice, not broadly accepted style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Pass already-needed GET_ITEM/GET_JOBJ values into an inline helper to change load/lifetime shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itKyasarin_FlipAndFall signature changed to include HSD_JObj* jobj and Item* ip
raw_diff: callsites pass GET_JOBJ(gobj), GET_ITEM(gobj)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: This is function-local evidence only; no general inline-helper standard should be inferred.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use GET_JOBJ instead of direct hsd_obj access where the local code shape supports it.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itlinkhookshot changes link->gobj->hsd_obj to GET_JOBJ(link->gobj)
raw_diff: itsamusgrapple uses HSD_JObjAnimAll(GET_JOBJ(gobj))
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Loaded standards say GET_JOBJ should be evidence-driven, not unconditional cleanup.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Expand a helper call into explicit operations when matching requires the operation sequence to be visible.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: samus_grapple_anim(gobj) replaced by HSD_JObjAnimAll(GET_JOBJ(gobj)) and a while loop over link->prev
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence shows this edit and bot improvement context, but not whether the helper expansion was reviewed as final style.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Regression - don't replace the constant with a variable for ordering. We can address this later.
evidence_refs: review_comments: src/melee/it/items/itseakchain.c discussion_r3374331432
review_comments diff hunk: it_802A24D0(link, 1.0f) changed to it_802A24D0(link, it_804DD0E0)
review_feedback.curation_note: This is direct review evidence against constant-to-variable replacement for ordering in this slice.

follow_up_queries: PR 2624 itseakchain constant variable ordering it_804DD0E0 1.0f
decomp-dev report PR 2624 9 improvements unmatched items

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merge state, changed file list, counts
human_pr_text: scope, split rationale, preliminary report, local checks
raw_diff: complete diff excerpt for all changed files
text_corpus: decomp-dev function-level improvement report
review_comments: one inline reviewer regression comment
notes: Evidence is strong for PR identity, file paths, concrete diff edits, and the reviewer comment.
The decomp-dev report gives function-level score changes, but the PR body says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative once complete; no full objdiff logs are loaded.
The preliminary report in the PR body describes the full unsplit source branch, not necessarily only this IT slice.
Review evidence contains one specific inline comment; no broader reviewer intent should be inferred.
The PR was merged, but this intake does not prove every tactic is an accepted global standard.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Do not replace a constant with a variable solely for ordering in a matching slice
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2624, reviewer PsiLupan called changing it_802A24D0(link, 1.0f) to it_802A24D0(link, it_804DD0E0) a regression and said not to replace the constant with a variable for ordering. This supports a narrow lesson for code-matching PRs: constant-to-data-variable edits need evidence beyond ordering pressure.
evidence_refs: review_comments: Regression - don't replace the constant with a variable for ordering. We can address this later.
review_comments diff hunk: it_802A24D0(link, 1.0f) to it_802A24D0(link, it_804DD0E0)

accepted_candidate_records.title: Local declaration order and alias lifetime edits appeared in IT unmatched-item score improvements
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2624 used narrow declaration-order, initialization timing, and local alias edits across IT item functions, and decomp-dev reported function-level unmatched-item improvements. Treat this as searchable historical evidence for local matching tactics, not as a style standard.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_802706D0, it_802BAF2C, fn_802B8384 declaration/init changes
raw_diff: hitbox_data4 and ip2 aliases
text_corpus: decomp-dev report with 9 improvements in unmatched items

source_update_candidates.title: Add review-backed warning against literal-to-variable ordering substitutions
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding PR #2624 as supporting historical evidence under literals-and-data-ownership or text-before-data-matching: a reviewer explicitly called replacing it_802A24D0(link, 1.0f) with it_804DD0E0 for ordering a regression and said to leave that for later.
evidence_refs: review_comments: PsiLupan comment on src/melee/it/items/itseakchain.c
review_comments diff hunk: 1.0f replaced by it_804DD0E0
source_update_candidates.reason: This review comment directly reinforces existing standards about not moving literals/constants into data symbols just to satisfy ordering.

rejection_notes: Do not promote GET_JOBJ as unconditional cleanup based on this PR; the loaded standard says GET_JOBJ use requires local evidence.
Do not infer that manual helper expansion, local aliasing, or declaration-order churn is preferred style; PR evidence only supports them as narrow matching tactics with bot score context.
Do not treat the full unsplit preliminary report numbers as the exact per-slice validation result; the PR body says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative for the slice.
Do not infer final accepted handling of the reviewer-flagged it_804DD0E0 change beyond the loaded merged state and the comment; no follow-up patch hunk is loaded showing a revert.
